{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315203922D8C4D20896B28428C9"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7618116915215860505","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"加油！！！=ᗜωᗜ="},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773735315,"group_id":"7616229181461892120","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"无聊摸鱼摆烂(>ω<)","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxmWzjYSAUFj4SQHDU+HHvU=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57cd7141581843998727e7aa8fc785ff~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776792529&x-signature=gGfjPaPEI%2Bqka5DSMxsyFV%2B95H4%3D","user_id":"298682552681342","user_name":"忘无川白秽忧"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"298682552681342","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7616229181461892120","book_info":{"abstract":"《我的马甲遍布全网》作品简介（修订版）
林河穿越到文娱匮乏的平行世界，发现自己能看到每个人头顶的“职业标签”，并能吸收其技能碎片，凝聚成拥有独立身份与专精的“分身”。

当全网为天才画家“河图”的绝美水墨疯狂时，没人知道他只是林河练习线条的分身“墨心”。

当乐坛被横空出世的音乐鬼才“洛神”搅动风云，那不过是林河某个分身“聆音”在深夜随手写的歌。

当神秘操盘手“逻各斯”在金融市场精准收割，那只是林河另一个分身为了赚生活费的数据游戏。

当暗网幽灵“零”无声渗透各方服务器，顶级黑客“幽影”反向追猎追踪者……
林河：都低调点，别到处给我惹事。
直到有一天……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/7a2d82b89dd0da9725d6394ddf92d775~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"谷雨前","author_id":"","book_id":"7616229181461892120","book_name":"我的马甲遍布全网","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#284068","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1743人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":262,"name":"都市脑洞","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=262&name=都市脑洞&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":90,"name":"天才","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=90&name=天才&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":841,"name":"群像","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=841&name=群像&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7616229207302996504","read_count":"1743","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"193780"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"50","tags":"都市脑洞,都市,都市异能,穿越,系统,天才,群像","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/7a2d82b89dd0da9725d6394ddf92d775~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779434439&x-signature=I4xD%2Fbwf1IRCDh9INlRH4wValhk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2990315734043560","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"14"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032315203922D8C4D20896B28428C9"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_
